title: Programmer art ore borders
description: Connect your ores like its the stone age!
body:
# Ore borders
### pretty self-explanatory innit
ores are _so retro_ and have emissive connecting ore borders :O

This pack is meant to be used alongside a the programmer art texture pack and maybe even a pack that changes deepslate to match this style

Deepslate ores use a darker version of the stone texture so maybe look for one that also does that (im probably gonna make my own take to match this texture pack)

## Supported mods
- create
- thats it

## Original description
This pack was originally a part of my fish pack but I reverted the diamonds back into normal and uploaded them as a seperate pack

This pack uses optifine features so yea u gonna need something that supports that to get all the features :P
